name: Lemon Turkey Tenderloins Master Recipe
recipeInstructions:
1. In a small bowl, combine the olive oil and lemon pepper seasoning.
2. Brush the mixture evenly over the turkey tenderloins.
3. Refrigerate, covered, for 20 minutes.
4. Preheat the broiler and place the tray 5 inches from the heat source.
5. Broil the tenderloins until no longer pink and juices run clear (15-20 total minutes), turning once.
6. Slice the cooked tenderloins half-inch thick.
7. Top each slice with Barnaise sauce or your favorite salsa.
8. Reserve any remaining tenderloins for Turkey Vegetable Stroganoff. Serves 4.
Tip: For an easy Barnaise Sauce, prepare 1 package (0.9 oz) of Barnaise Sauce Mix according to the package directions. Spoon over the turkey and garnish with capers.
